---
name: Design proposal
about: Propose a product, architecture, schema, or trust-model change
title: "Design: "
labels: ["design", "proposal"]
---

## Proposal

What should change?

## Why now

Why does this matter for mission control for agentic work?

## Core loop impact

Which part of the loop changes?

- [ ] Harnessfile
- [ ] dry-run plan
- [ ] policy gate
- [ ] adapter action
- [ ] run ledger
- [ ] eval
- [ ] promotion
- [ ] contributor experience

## Trust boundary

What should AI be allowed to propose, and what must deterministic code or a
human still verify?

## User experience

How does this stay useful in 60 seconds and powerful after 10 minutes?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Decision can be documented in `docs/decision-log.md`.
- [ ] The change strengthens the core loop.
- [ ] QA path is clear before implementation starts.
